selected: to feast on bloody, bloody meat

system.moves:
- Grab on and stab stab stab
- Fend off any who would steal the flock’s meal
- Scent blood from miles away

About the size of a woodpecker, with black and wine-red plumage, flitting about in small flocks (2d6+4). Their laugh will make your blood run cold. But don’t worry. They’ll get your blood flowing again, real soon. Something interesting: Butcherbirds can smell fresh blood from miles away, and might descend on a hunter’s kill to gorge. Something useful: They can smell the blood of their own, and shun it; smeared butcherbird blood is an excellent repellent.
